title: Plastic Shower Curtain Rings Hooks for Bathroom Shower Window Rod (24 Pack Clear)
features: Size of shower rings: the inside of the ring from top to bottom is 1.77 inches; The inside from side to side is 1.1inches,Suitable for use with shower curtain rod less than 1.1 inches in diameter.
good quality：Made of high quality plastic, flexible, easy to bend and work into the shower curtain hole; You never have to worry about the ring rusting in a wet bathroom
Easy to use: the rings are open and don't need to fasten, they can be easily installed without taking the rod down
C-type design: open and close the shower curtain, c-type curtain ring is easy to slide; No need to yank and break the curtains
packaging: package includes 24 pcs shower curtain rings hooks; 12 pcs rings packed in one box, totally 24 pcs packed in 2 boxes
description: Product Description Size of shower rings: the inside of the ring from top to bottom is 1.77 inches; The inside from side to side is 1.1inches,Suitable for use with shower curtain rod less than 1.1 inches in diameter.
